name: create_discount
description: Create a new discount code with a fixed amount or percentage off the order total. Supports conditions like minimum order amount, maximum number of usages, product-specific restrictions, expiry dates, and combinability with other discounts.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Internal name for the discount (for merchant reference).

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The discount code that customers enter at checkout.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.description: Discount percentage (required when type is 'Rate'). Value between 0 and 100.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Discount amount in currency (required when type is 'FixedAmount' or 'FixedAmountOnItems').

parameters.name: maxNumberOfUsages
parameters.description: Maximum number of times the discount can be used (null for unlimited).

parameters.name: expires
parameters.description: Expiration date for the discount (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: combinable
parameters.description: Whether this discount can be combined with other discounts.

parameters.name: trigger
parameters.description: How the discount is triggered: 'Code' (customer enters code) or 'Total' (automatic based on cart total).
